title: SyncSubscriptionRequest
description: Client request describing which sync streams and filters should be subscribed to.

client_id.description: Unique identifier for the syncing client instance.

household_id.description: Optional household scope for shared data.

streams.description: List of sync streams requested by the client.

filters.description: Optional filters narrowing the subscription scope.

updated_after.description: Optional cursor timestamp for incremental sync.

capabilities.description: Client capability hints for sync optimization.
